title: Front End Web Development
description: This course will provide you with all of the essentials to become a successful frontend web developer. You will learn to use HTML5, CSS and JS.

title: Full Stack Web Development
description: In this course you will learn full stack web development, first learning the backend with Node.js and Express then the frontend with React.

title: UI/UX Design
description: This course will teach you the fundamentals of UI/UX design, working with tools like Figma to create beautiful and functional user interfaces.

title: Backend Development with Node.js
description: Learn to build robust backend systems using Node.js, Express and MongoDB, including authentication and RESTful API design.

title: Data Science Fundamentals
description: An introduction to data science covering Python, data analysis, visualization, and basic machine learning concepts.

title: Advanced JavaScript Concepts
description: Deep dive into advanced JavaScript topics including closures, prototypes, async programming, and design patterns.

title: Business for Developers
description: Learn the business side of software development, including freelancing, client management, and building your own tech startup.
